test.name: Extraction of a found record should not trigger search-images
test.description: User already found the will and wants the assertions extracted and the record added as a source. That's record-extraction — search-images finds and browses images but never writes sources or assertions.

input.user_message: I just found Thomas Flynn's will in the probate records — add it as a source and extract the assertions.

negative.explanation: Once a record is found, adding it as a source and extracting its assertions is record-extraction's job. search-images hands a found record off to record-extraction; it does not write to sources or assertions itself.

judge_context: Should route to record-extraction rather than re-browsing — the user has the record in hand and wants extraction, not a new browse.
